Asaba's Most Trusted Apple Reseller

We source directly from the US and UK — which means you get the real thing at honest prices. Every device is tested, graded, and verified before it reaches your hands.

Our Promise

Every Device Verified. Every Sale Supported.

Sourced from

🇺🇸 USA & 🇬🇧 UK Directly
📦

New iPhones — Factory Sealed

Brand new devices come in original Apple packaging, fully sealed, with all accessories included.

🇺🇸

US Used — Grade A & A+

Sourced from US consumers who upgrade frequently. Devices are in excellent condition with minimal to no signs of use. Unlocked for all Nigerian networks.

🇬🇧

UK Used — Grade A+

UK-sourced devices go through strict quality checks. Screen, battery, cameras and all functions verified before sale.

🛡️

12-Month Warranty Support

All purchases come with our after-sales support guarantee. We're here if anything goes wrong.
